history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A vertical game-like interface shows a dark blue screen filled with circular character icons, text lines, and chat-style controls.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a column of multiple circular portrait icons showing stylized faces and characters, each paired with short lines of text, alongside several small circular buttons and arrows indicating selectable items.

Setting:
The scene is entirely within a digital interface on a dark, bluish background with a faint starry or glowing effect, suggesting a menu or event list screen. Lighting is generated by on-screen graphics with glowing highlights and neon-like accents.

Visual Details:
The background is predominantly deep blue with lighter blue gradients and faint bright dots. Along the upper portion are small circular portraits arranged in a row, each surrounded by neon rings and multiple small red “no” symbols that look like circled prohibition icons. In the middle-left area, several larger rectangular text-and-portrait blocks appear, each featuring a character face (anime or game-styled) with bright colors such as pink, gold, purple, and teal, plus coin-like golden circular icons and blue arrow-like symbols beside them. A chat input bar sits at the bottom: on the left is a dark rectangular box with a speech bubble icon, and in the middle is a longer dark bar containing readable text. On the right side of the bottom interface are circular buttons with icons, including one that resembles a muted speaker or similar control, and another with an arrow-like symbol. The camera view is straight-on and centered on the interface; the composition is crowded with UI elements aligned vertically, mostly left-of-center.

Visible Text:
ISME Asesino agudo.
121 n, nanak «
TW Icha Suka Matcha
SF Valls kiy.
AKU 太陽 ella..
Asesino agudo. : Layla aja u

No other important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a dark blue, game-style interface with multiple character portraits and selectable icons. A chat-like bar at the bottom displays the text “Asesino agudo. : Layla aja u” and the interface includes several circular control buttons.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

ISME Asesino agudo.

121 n, nanak «

TW Icha Suka Matcha.

SF Vallsly.

AKU 太陽 ella..

Asesino agudo. : Layla a[unclear]

# Structured Version

## Lobby/Selection List (visible lines)
- ISME Asesino agudo.
- 121 n, nanak «
- TW Icha Suka Matcha.
- SF Vallsly.
- AKU 太陽 ella..

## Chat/Message Bar (bottom)

# Notes
- The last line (“Asesino agudo. : Layla a[unclear]”) is partially obscured/unclear after “a”.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Tampilan di atas adalah tangkapan layar dari sebuah permainan Mobile Legends. Terlihat daftar pemain yang sedang berada di dalam lobi atau pertandingan, beserta avatar dan nama pemain mereka. Ada juga beberapa ikon yang menunjukkan status atau pilihan pemain. Di bagian bawah, terdapat jendela obrolan dengan pesan yang diketik oleh salah satu pemain. Tidak ada konten NSFW dalam gambar ini.
